name: learnhub-lms
description: LearnHub LMS — React frontend + Node.js/Express backend

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix lms-backend" "npm run dev --prefix lms-frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix lms-backend && npm install --prefix lms-frontend
